novel_features.name: Offline corpus harvest
novel_features.description: Mirror a research area's theses into a local database so you can search and analyze offline without re-hitting the site.
novel_features.rationale: Shodhganga exposes no API and returns HTML only; persisting extracted Dublin Core records locally is the foundation every offline feature builds on.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this first when an agent will run many follow-up queries over the same research area — harvest once, then everything else is instant and offline.

novel_features.name: Guide-centric index
novel_features.description: List every thesis supervised by a given research guide across the harvested corpus.
novel_features.rationale: The web UI has no supervisor-centric view; this requires a local join over stored DC.contributor fields across many theses.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when mapping a supervisor's body of work or building academic-lineage graphs the site can't produce.

novel_features.name: University research profile
novel_features.description: Aggregate a university's theses in the local store into a profile: thesis count, subject spread, and year range.
novel_features.rationale: Requires grouping stored theses by university and subject; no single Shodhganga page provides this rollup.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to compare institutions' doctoral output or profile a university's research strengths.

novel_features.name: Subject/year trends
novel_features.description: Show how thesis counts for a subject change over completion year across the harvested corpus.
novel_features.rationale: Requires grouping stored theses by year and subject — no UI page offers time-series over a research area.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to spot rising or declining research areas in Indian doctoral output.

novel_features.name: Similar theses
novel_features.description: Find theses in the local store that share the most subject keywords with a given thesis.
novel_features.rationale: Requires local subject-overlap scoring across the stored corpus; the site offers no 'related items'.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to expand a literature review outward from one relevant thesis.

narrative.headline: Structured, scriptable, agent-native access to India's national reservoir of PhD theses — the machine API Shodhganga never shipped.
narrative.value_prop: Shodhganga hosts 600,000+ Indian doctoral theses from 900+ universities but exposes no OAI, REST, or OpenSearch API — only HTML. This CLI turns every thesis into a structured Dublin Core record you can search and export as JSON, then mirror a research area into a local database for instant offline analysis with guide-centric indexes, university profiles, and subject trends the web UI can't produce.

quickstart.comment: confirm the CLI is wired and the site is reachable before searching
keyword-search all theses and get structured rows
pull the full Dublin Core metadata record for one thesis (accepts 305247 or 10603/305247)
mirror a research area into the local store for offline analysis
list every thesis a supervisor guided (harvest that area first)

troubleshoots.symptom: thesis search returns no rows for a topic you expect results for
troubleshoots.fix: Shodhganga tokenizes loosely; try a broader single-keyword query, or raise --limit
these read the local store — run 'shodhganga-pp-cli harvest <query>' first to populate it

troubleshoots.symptom: thesis get says handle not found
troubleshoots.fix: pass the bare number (305247), the full handle (10603/305247), or the hdl.handle.net URI; all are accepted

troubleshoots.symptom: thesis search or harvest hangs or times out
troubleshoots.fix: Shodhganga's search backend is occasionally overloaded and slow; item lookups (thesis get) stay fast. Retry, lower --limit, or raise --timeout (e.g. --timeout 90s).

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when an agent or script needs structured metadata about Indian PhD/MPhil theses — literature reviews, supervisor or university research profiles, subject-trend analysis, or building a citable corpus. It is the only programmatic path to Shodhganga, whose web UI returns HTML with no API.
anti_triggers: Downloading full-text thesis PDFs — those are login-gated on Shodhganga and out of scope for this CLI.
Theses outside India or non-doctoral works — Shodhganga only holds Indian PhD/MPhil ETDs.
Real-time citation counts or impact metrics — Shodhganga carries no citation data.

recipes.title: Structured metadata for a known thesis
recipes.explanation: Pull just the fields you need from the full Dublin Core record; deeply nested output narrows cleanly with --select.

recipes.title: Harvest a research area for offline analysis
recipes.explanation: Mirror a topic once; then trends, guide, similar, and 'search --data-source local' all run instantly against the local store.

recipes.title: Map a supervisor's students
recipes.explanation: After harvesting the relevant area, list every thesis a research guide supervised.

recipes.title: Expand a literature review
recipes.explanation: Find theses sharing the most subject keywords with a relevant one, ranked by overlap.
